---
title: Call Centre
---

Weekly call centre data extracted from the CanadaLogin support queue Excel
reports. These two tables share the same source and update cadence but are at
different grains: `weekly_activity_report` is one row per week, while
`weekly_topic_dump` is one row per topic record per call.

{{< include call_centre/weekly_activity_report.qmd >}}

{{< include call_centre/weekly_topic_dump.qmd >}}
